_comment: v3.0 W6-7 hooks template. Copy to <USB_root>/NeuroBoot.hooks.json or <USB_root>/NeuroBoot/hooks.json. All hooks run in PowerShell -NoProfile -NonInteractive. Default timeout 10s; clamped to [1, 60]. Only 'type: command' is supported. Remove this _comment key before use (extra keys are tolerated but noisy).

_environment_vars_passed_to_hooks.SessionStart_and_Stop: no env vars (no tool context at those moments)

_behavior_notes.SessionStart: stdout gets appended to system_prompt before first model turn; exit code logged only
_behavior_notes.PreToolUse: non-zero exit BLOCKS the tool call - tool is not executed, agent sees (hook rejected) reason and decides what to do next; matcher (optional) does exact tool name match
_behavior_notes.PostToolUse: exit code log-only - tool already ran, cannot undo; matcher same as PreToolUse
_behavior_notes.Stop: fires before AgentEvent::Done; exit code log-only
